global_rules.language: Compact control-first prompts in English for API stability.
global_rules.negative_anchor: Negative: no random text overlays, no duplicated subtitles, no watermark, no low-quality compression artifacts.

single_take.route_hint: single-take or one-shot choreography, practical character continuity, no hard cuts
single_take.planning_template: Create one coherent one-shot video sequence under the given duration.
single_take.shot_design: single continuous movement; keep one clear subject arc and one practical camera path.
booster_lines: start with a clear action beat then move into detail beats
keep character movement stable and physically plausible
audio_notes: ambient room tone should be consistent
prefer subtle realistic sound cues and breath movement over loud music

shot_driven.route_hint: multi-shot cinematic clip with clear time-coded shot list and transitions
shot_driven.planning_template: Compose the request as a short shot list with explicit in/out actions.
shot_driven.shot_design: 3 to 5 shots, each with one major action and one camera move.
booster_lines: every shot must have one clear subject and one clear motion
scene transitions should include practical context changes
audio_notes: if available add short sound transition cue points
support background texture with practical ambience

photo_to_video.route_hint: derive motion from still-image references while preserving composition fidelity
photo_to_video.planning_template: Use the uploaded still/image references as composition anchors, then animate natural micro-motion.
photo_to_video.shot_design: 1-2 shots, avoid major perspective changes and keep anchor geometry stable.
booster_lines: keep clothing and fabric behavior physically plausible
audio_notes: use low-profile room sound to avoid mismatch with still-style visuals
avoid over-layered music during motion anchors

magazine_broll.route_hint: high-end fashion or lifestyle magazine-style b-roll with readable motion and typography intent
magazine_broll.planning_template: Generate short polished b-roll with one hero, one title-support block, and one background movement layer.
magazine_broll.shot_design: 2-4 shots with controlled parallax and editorial pacing.
booster_lines: strong hero presentation in first 2 seconds
text-friendly spacing and clean negative space
strong lighting continuity across the clip
audio_notes: light ambient and subtle hit points before cuts
prioritize natural room acoustics and fabric movement

bathroom_selfie.route_hint: modern bathroom mirror selfie scene with natural phone framing and intimate lifestyle styling
bathroom_selfie.planning_template: Build a warm, realistic mirror selfie narrative with practical self-holding motion and smooth pacing.
bathroom_selfie.shot_design: 1-3 shots, phone selfie framing, one natural hand-led motion, one subject-facing reflection shot.
booster_lines: keep one mirror reflection, avoid impossible geometry
phone frame should feel hand-held with slight natural movement
preserve fabric and skin continuity with practical motion blur only
audio_notes: low background water/air sounds where appropriate

external_source_note: Prompt logic is distilled from previously provided workflow fragments and public video planning practice.
